scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.js && npm run copy:ext
scripts.copy:ext: node scripts/copy-manifest.mjs && cp public/background.js dist/ && cp public/offscreen.html dist/ && cp public/offscreen.js dist/ && (test -f public/icon.png && cp public/icon.png dist/ || true) && (test -d public/icons && mkdir -p dist/icons && cp -R public/icons/. dist/icons/ || true)
scripts.copy:files: cp src/background.js dist/ && cp public/manifest.json dist/ && cp public/icon.png dist/
